offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts and lost sales. We provide an inventory forecasting algorithm instead of manual tracking of inventory levels.
problem: Inaccurate inventory levels leading to stockouts or overstocking.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions about inventory management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for Etsy sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try sales data analysis on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
